productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Red Blue Checked Shirt
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has red and blue gingham checks, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the left chest with buttoned closures, piping detail on the sleeve hems, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this   red and blue gingham check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
